max_entry_age.source_quote: Maximum entry age of any individual is 65(sixty five) years

grace_period.source_quote: Grace Period for payment of the premium shall be thirty days

free_look_period.source_quote: free look period of thirty days from date of receipt of the policy document

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: First 30 days waiting period (Excl 03) a) Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within thirty (30) days from the first policy commencement date shall be excluded

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Pre-Existing Diseases (Excl 01) a) Expenses related to the treatment of a Pre-Existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of thirty six (36) months of continuous coverage

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: 90 days/ one year/ two year/ three years (as specified against specific disease/ procedure)

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: The female Insured Person should have been continuously covered for at least 24 months

network_hospital_count.source_note: 5322 Network Hospitals ('Why Choose NICL' section, scraped 2026-05-15)

room_rent_capped_at_pct_of_si.source_quote: Room/ ICU charges Room - Up to 1% of SI per day ICU - Up to 2% of SI per day subject to max. of INR 15,000 per day

ayush_coverage.source_quote: 1.2.5 AYUSH Treatment The Company shall indemnify Medical Expenses incurred for Inpatient Care treatment under Ayurveda, Yoga and Naturopathy, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy systems of medicines during each Policy Period up to the limit of Sum Insured

maternity_coverage.source_quote: 1.2.7 Maternity The Company shall indemnify Maternity Expenses as described below for any female Insured Person, and also Pre-Natal and Post-Natal Hospitalisation expenses per delivery

newborn_coverage.source_quote: New Born Baby shall be covered only if specifically included in the Policy mid-term and requisite premium paid to the Company.

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: 1.2.6 Organ Donor's Medical Expenses The Company shall indemnify the Medical Expenses incurred in respect of an organ donor's Hospitalisation during the Policy Period for harvesting of the organ donated

preventive_health_checkup.source_quote: 1.4.2 Health Check Up Expenses of health check up shall be reimbursed (irrespective of past claims) at the end of a block of two continuous policy period, provided the policy has been continuously renewed with the company without a break.

critical_illness_cover.source_quote: The policy also provides optional covers for Critical Illness and Out-patient Treatment.

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless facility is available if opted for TPA service, subject to prior approval by the TPA

no_claim_bonus_cap_pct.source_quote: not be accumulated in excess of 50% of the Basic Sum Insured

tat_cashless_authorization_hours.source_quote: pre-authorization letter within an hour to the Hospital after verification

room_rent_capping.value: Plan-tiered (1% SI in A; Rs 15-20K in B/C)
room_rent_capping.source_quote: Room/ ICU charges Room - Up to 1% of SI per day ICU - Up to 2% of SI per day subject to max. of INR 15,000 per day

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: cumulative bonus allowed shall be an amount equal to 5% (five percent) of sum insured
